source.body_text_sample:
menu
we’re always looking for talent that marvels us
work where you matter

We believe the manner in which something is built is as much a part of the solution as the visual design. That’s why our team members are involved in projects from the initial discovery and strategy all the way through execution.

We don’t make decisions involving user experience, visual design, or architecture in a void. Our team members collaborate as active decision-makers throughout all of our client relationships — from handshake to launch and ongoing management.

we’re hiring web developers
daily responsibilities
A large majority of the time you will be responsible for managing customer support tickets assigned to you.
Build, maintain, and upgrade customer WordPress sites
Collaborate with your Team Lead to successfully fulfill project objectives
General web development from full-site builds to smaller support tasks with an equal focus on PHP and front-end work
Deep WordPress them customization
Third-party integrations (e.g. Stripe, Marketo, RESTful APIs in general, etc.)
Assist with internal development operations, as well as in the development of internal tools
required skills
3+ years of experience in a similar development role with solid experience building custom WordPress themes using PHP
3+ years of working experience and ability with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Ability to be a quick learner and to work well in a team environment: supportive, collaborative, cooperative, and customer service-
